title: Emergency Alerts test, 7 September: Accessible materials
body: "The UK government will be carrying out a second national test of the Emergency Alerts system on Sunday 7 September 2025 at 3pm.   Use the links below to access accessible information related to the national test, including Easy Read explainers and British Sign Language (BSL) videos.  Easy Read    Easy Read explainer, English  (PDF, 1.86 MB, 4 pages)  Easy Read explainer, Welsh  (PDF, 1.81 MB, 4 pages)   Audio content  Audio content (20 sec), English (wav, 6MB)  Audio content (20 sec), Welsh (wav, 6MB)  British Sign Language (BSL) videos  English subtitles  National Emergency Alert BSL - English Version  Welsh subtitles  National Emergency Alerts BSL - Welsh Version "
